comment.body:
Thanks for the super helpful posts Alma. I have couple of questions.

1. Are not most indicators lagging. For e.g. RSI only moves after price moves and not before. Options flow is the only one I know to be leading. Are there any other leading indicators ?

2. What is your opinion about smart money concepts which derived from Wyckoff. Equal lows indicating buy liquidity zones, equal highs sell zones. Fair value gaps etc. Market retracing to FVG which matches with your analogy of offering fair value ?

user.name: han
user.bio: Mch7a7

comment.body:
my problem with fibs (even tho i used them more than a decades ago, for one year i think, and it helped me in monhtly swings), that it is literally just guessing, with a coinflip.
ppl say that elliott wave is subjective, but it at least gives a system for the person to classify the market moves...
but fib retracements are literally jus coin flip guessing.
it only gives you a higher chance assumptions on a longer: monthly yearly timeframes, bcs of the logaritmic nature of growth, but nothing else

comment.body: The RSI (Relative Strength Index) is often considered a lagging indicator because it reacts to price movements, meaning the price has to move first before the RSI shows a change.
comment.raw_body: The RSI (Relative Strength Index) is often considered a lagging indicator because it reacts to price movements, meaning the price has to move first before the RSI shows a change.

comment.body: RSI can show you what’s most likely about to happen if you read it properly.
comment.raw_body: RSI can show you what’s most likely about to happen if you read it properly.

comment.body:
RSI only what i said. Nothing more nothing less. 
Think about that. 
Nothing is predictive. 
Even options flows, only on a certain level.

Options positioning predetermines the dealer flow, but positioning also can change. The thing is, that you can derive some extra effects that will shape the structure, like zomma, vomma, veta, charm, vanna...
comment.raw_body:
RSI only what i said. Nothing more nothing less.

Nothing is predictive. 
Even options flows, only on a certain level.

Options positioning predetermines the dealer flow, but positioning also can change. The thing is, that you can derive some extra effects that will shape the structure, like zomma, vomma, veta, charm, vanna...
